   = a² + ab + ab + b²  
   = a² + 2ab + b².  

   The two cross-products, ab and ab, have the same sign, so they add to 2ab.  Therefore three distinct terms remain—a trinomial.

   = a·a  +  a·b  –  b·a  –  b·b
